rationale: Build on the current best columnwise MLP-fc int8 path by spending a small slice of the remaining 16MB budget on the worst per-row quantization errors. The script now stores a tiny fp16 rescue set for high-error rows in selected int8 matrices, wires that through dequantization and quant-aware roundtrip training, and keeps the file under 1500 lines. This directly targets the final int8 zlib roundtrip metric instead of training loss.
title: Hybrid FP16 Rescue Rows For Transposed MLP Int8
